summary: Both edits satisfy every acceptance criterion in tasks/5.md and stay within the documentation-writing principles. The Light bullet is rewritten with the correct three-field list, the resetConversation/LIGHT_OVERRIDE mechanism, the UI-history-preserved note, and the maxTokens-belongs-in-Heavy callout; the ErrorLog section grows the whitelist to 15 with `inference-reset` and adds a rationale paragraph covering caller, all six ResetReason values, level convention, and the SAF-export operational role. Density and style match the surrounding Semi-light/Heavy bullets and the existing Phase-origin breakdown paragraph; no bloat, no code blocks, no generic framework prose.

findings.section: ErrorLog component strings — Phase-origin breakdown + new rationale paragraph (lines 18 and 20)
findings.description: The Phase-origin paragraph closes with 'Phase 3.6 added `inference-reset` (see next paragraph).' and the immediately following paragraph opens with '`inference-reset` (Phase 3.6 addition)…'. The phase marker is therefore restated in two adjacent sentences. Functionally a forward reference + landing recap, but technically a one-clause overlap.
findings.recommendation: Optional polish: drop the trailing parenthetical 'see next paragraph' from line 18 (the next paragraph is visually adjacent — the pointer adds little) OR drop '(Phase 3.6 addition)' from the opening of line 20 since the previous paragraph already established the phase. Either trim is fine; current state is acceptable.

findings.description: The closing sentence ('surfaces in the SAF-exported diagnostic log (Diagnostics → Export logs) so KV-cache leakage between chats and stale-sampler regressions can be triaged from a single grep on `inference-reset`.') is information-dense and slightly longer than the parallel sentences in other component descriptions. It carries real operational content (export path + grep workflow + two failure-mode keywords) so it is not bloat in the strict sense, but a tighter form would match the Phase-origin paragraph's brevity better.
findings.recommendation: Optional: tighten to e.g. 'surfaces in SAF-exported diagnostic logs so KV-cache leakage and stale-sampler regressions can be greppable from a single tag.' Current wording is acceptable — the longer form keeps the concrete UI path ('Diagnostics → Export logs') which has operational value.

acceptanceCriteriaCheck.lightBulletNoStaleClaim: pass — phrase 'applies from next send() without engine touch' is gone; new wording explicitly states resetConversation recreates the Conversation
acceptanceCriteriaCheck.lightBulletPreservesUiHistory: pass — 'UI history (in-memory message list + Room rows) is preserved — Light is a sampler refresh, not a context wipe'
acceptanceCriteriaCheck.lightBulletMaxTokensInHeavy: pass — '`maxTokens` is baked into `EngineConfig` at engine creation and therefore lives in the Heavy tier'
acceptanceCriteriaCheck.whitelistContainsInferenceReset: pass — `"inference-reset"` present in the inline list at line 16 and in the rationale paragraph at line 20
acceptanceCriteriaCheck.whitelistCountUpdated: pass — '15 values are allowed' on line 16; no remaining '14 values are allowed'
acceptanceCriteriaCheck.rationaleCoversCallerAndReasons: pass — 'every `DefaultModelRegistry.resetConversation` call regardless of caller'; six reasons listed (CHAT_SWITCH, DRAFT_COMMIT, LIGHT_OVERRIDE, SYSTEM_PROMPT, HEAVY, USER)
acceptanceCriteriaCheck.rationaleCoversLevelConvention: pass — 'errorLog.i on the success path … errorLog.w on the non-Ready skip'
acceptanceCriteriaCheck.rationaleCoversOperationalRole: pass — 'surfaces in the SAF-exported diagnostic log (Diagnostics → Export logs) so KV-cache leakage between chats and stale-sampler regressions can be triaged from a single grep on inference-reset'
acceptanceCriteriaCheck.diffScopeConfined: pass — only § D15 Light bullet (line 64) and § ErrorLog component strings (lines 16, 18, 20) touched; Semi-light, Heavy, classifyApplyLevel paragraph, all other sections untouched
acceptanceCriteriaCheck.languageConvention: pass — English prose, code identifiers in backticks, Russian only inside the existing snackbar string quote
acceptanceCriteriaCheck.markdownFormatting: pass — bullet style preserved, bold tier names intact, backticked code identifiers consistent with surrounding bullets
